discount_code_text:
Patagonia (United States)
Patagonia (Canada)

To access your Patagonia discount, use the appropriate link above then login or create an account. Your discount will be applied automatically on checkout.

*Certain items are excluded and will not be discounted at checkout. Excluded items change frequently and are often color specific. If the item you are looking for is not available Patagonia Customer Service may be able to help you find a substitute.
(Online Orders only, Not eligible for other discounted items, sales, pro offers and certain products are not included. Please return any AAC online orders back to the Patagonia Service Center in Reno. In-store returns of discounted items is prohibited. U.S. and Canadian customers only.)
